title: Rishi Sunak - Prime Minister - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Columnist, Sunday Times Mr Sunak received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on taking up a role as columnist with the Sunday Times. The advice was provided in October 2025 and the appointment was announced later that month.  Member of the Bloomberg New Economy Forum Advisory Board, Bloomberg Mr Sunak received advice on taking up an unpaid role with Bloomberg.  This advice was considered and provided by ACOBA before it closed on 12 October 2025, but announced on 16  October. The Independent Adviser has not had a role in determining this advice.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Mr Sunak before its closure. "
